title: Translation Request
description: Schema for a Google Cloud Translation text translation request.

contents.description: The content of the input text to translate.

mimeType.description: The format of the source text, e.g., text/plain or text/html.

sourceLanguageCode.description: BCP-47 language code of the input text.

targetLanguageCode.description: BCP-47 language code of the target translation language.

glossaryConfig.description: Optional glossary to use for translation.

ignoreCase.description: Whether to ignore case when matching glossary terms.

model.description: The model resource name to use for translation.
